title: Rural referral centers
doc_html:
§2195.3. Rural referral centers

           The Louisiana Department of Health shall, subject to federal approval, provide for adjustments in the disproportionate share Medicaid reimbursement formula to provide increased support for hospitals which are classified as rural referral centers.

           Acts 1991, No. 394, §1.
doc_text:
§2195.3.  Rural referral centers
The Louisiana Department of Health shall, subject to federal approval,
provide for adjustments in the disproportionate share Medicaid reimbursement
formula to provide increased support for hospitals which are classified as rural
referral centers.
Acts 1991, No. 394, §1.
